description:
Design like a professional using Mobbin and get 20% off: https://mobbin.com/kole

Dashboard UIs are super common on portfolios and are only getting more important as AI makes softwares and software as a service easier to produce. In this video we'll cover everything you'll need to know to design a professional and UX friendly dashboard completely from scratch.

Enjoying the content? Subscribe for more!
@KoleJain 

Figma files:
https://kolejain.com/resources?scrollTo=dashboard-ui

Related links:
https://refer.dub.co/kole-jain
